title: Subagent Return Contract
description: G7 typed return value from subagent → orchestrator. Embedded in subagent's final message. Validated by subagent-stop-learnings.py hook (B8). Replaces free-form HANDOFF text from team-protocols. On validation failure: log to errors.log, fail-open, surface diagnostic to orchestrator (per Round 6 HIGH-4).

trace_id.description: MUST match the trace_id from the spawn payload that triggered this subagent. Enables span tracing.

status.description: Lifecycle state. in_progress = NON-terminal checkpoint state: per the write-early ordering (retrospective P1-5), the envelope is written FIRST with status in_progress and result.summary already populated, BEFORE self-verification, then overwritten/finalized to a terminal state (ok/failed/partial) once verification completes. A truncation mid-verify therefore leaves a discoverable partial envelope with the work summary already persisted instead of nothing. in_progress does NOT require needs_clarification and does NOT trigger the needs_clarification conditional. Terminal states: ok = goal achieved, work complete. needs_clarification = subagent halted awaiting user input. failed = work could not be completed. partial = some deliverables done, others blocked.

tokens_used.description: Actual token spend. Reported back to session token meter for aggregate tracking.

tool_calls.description: Count of tool invocations. Compared against budget.max_tool_calls.

summary.description: One paragraph summary of what was done.

files_changed.description: Repo-relative paths of created/modified files. MUST be produced mechanically from `git status --porcelain` plus untracked files at return time (retrospective P1-6) — never recalled from memory or reconstructed from tool-call history.

diff_size_lines.description: Total lines added + removed across all files_changed.

result.description: Structured deliverable description. Schema is open: workflow-specific fields allowed under additionalProperties.

artefact_id.description: Path or ID of the artefact

quote.description: Direct quote from the artefact supporting the claim

span.description: Line range or span identifier within the artefact

evidence.description: Citations supporting result.summary claims. Required for faithfulness rubric (G5) — every non-trivial claim should trace back to a specific artefact.

risks.description: Self-identified risks the orchestrator should flag to user. Examples: low_test_coverage, external_dependency_unverified, possible_prompt_injection_detected.

next_actions.description: Suggestions for the next subagent in the pipeline. Example: 'reviewer: focus on error path coverage'.

needs_clarification.description: If status=needs_clarification, the question to ask the user. Otherwise null.
